---
title: "Useful R packages"
format:
  revealjs:
    toc: false
---

## 2026 placeholder

Alex will lead this Day 2 core module. The final deck will be added here when it
is ready.

For now, this placeholder keeps the public schedule and navigation path stable.

## Planned scope

- Packages that make common analysis and reporting tasks easier.
- Table-making and model-summary tools useful for Exercise 2.
- Practical package choices rather than a long package survey.

## Course connection

This module prepares you to make readable descriptive tables, model summaries,
and polished report outputs in Exercise 2.
